_comment: Click-band alias-audit baseline captured against v0.5.1 default config (behavioral power amp, MLP h16, pickup soft-saturation, Phase-5 noise OFF). Generated by `preamp-bench alias-audit --note <n> --velocity 120 --json` at 44.1 kHz host rate. The regression test in alias_audit::tests asserts that each metric stays within tolerance of these values; a worsening means the click-band spectrum changed and warrants investigation (it may be a real audible regression, or a benign re-tuning). When intentionally re-tuning, regenerate this file via `tools/scripts/refresh_alias_baseline.sh` (or by hand) and explain the delta in the commit message.
